orthad_laws: Orthad computes from accrued lifted-state history; no candidates/search/scores.
Lens/readout structure is deterministic footprint of primitive Q/B/L word.
Lifted state carries native coordinates and accrued operator word.
Orthad reads lifted state and does not alter it.
Scalars are terminal projections read from completed lift.

formal_macro_layer.PC_R: Q o B = B o Q on the declared balanced-window macro layer
formal_macro_layer.PC_S: Q on the declared balanced-window macro layer
formal_macro_layer.PC_T: L on the declared balanced-window macro layer

readout_form: Orthad lens Omega is an ordered retained basis/diagonal lens compiled from the Q/B/L word; L latches one active axis and opens one new orthogonal slot.
